view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for fixed-duration appointments is satisfied as evidenced by the linked use case and prior step evidence.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for fixed-duration appointments is satisfied as evidenced by the linked use case and prior step evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for fixed-duration appointments, specifically 50-minute slots, as described in the linked use case. The use case outlines a booking process where clients can select 50-minute time slots, confirming the existence of fixed-duration appointments. Additionally, the prior step evidence shows that customers have successfully booked appointments with confirmed start and end times that align with the 50-minute duration, directly supporting the requirement's coverage.
